---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact · Theodor Balan"
---

```{=html}
<main>
  <div class="wrap">
    <h1>Contact</h1>

    <ul class="contact-list">
      <li>
        <span class="contact-label">Email</span>
        <a href="mailto:hello@tbalan.com">hello@tbalan.com</a>
      </li>
      <li>
        <span class="contact-label">GitHub</span>
        <a href="https://github.com/tbalan/">github.com/tbalan</a>
      </li>
      <li>
        <span class="contact-label">LinkedIn</span>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/thbalan/">linkedin.com/in/thbalan</a>
      </li>
      <li>
        <span class="contact-label">Google Scholar</span>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-v5tVyUAAAAJ&hl=en">Scholar Profile</a>
      </li>
      <li>
        <span class="contact-label">Medium</span>
        <a href="https://medium.com/@thbalan">medium.com/@thbalan</a>
      </li>
    </ul>
  </div>
</main>
```
